morning_thesis: SPY recovered overnight from 6/23 session close (~734.97) and is grinding up through premarket, reaching PMH 737.11 by 08:30 ET. Saty Pivot Ribbon is fully BULLISH (Fast 736.66 > Pivot 736.21 > Slow 735.92, 74c spread) — first BULL ribbon in multiple sessions following the 6/22–6/23 sell-off (743.86→~735). Price is above SMA50 (735.58). Key resistance cluster starts at 743.35 (former Carry double-bottom support, broken on 6/23 close — now overhead resistance). PCE tomorrow 08:30 ET is the macro overhang. Primary setup (BEARISH_REJECTION_RIDE_THE_RIBBON) requires BEAR ribbon — NOT active at open. Watch for ribbon flip if SPY reaches 743.35 zone and gets rejected. BULLISH_RECLAIM remains DRAFT. Today is likely HOLD or opportunistic if ribbon stays stacked and price breaks PMH 737.11.

predictions.claim: SPY breaks and holds 5m close above PMH 737.20, extending toward 743.35 zone
predictions.invalidation: 5m close below 736.50 after 09:35 ET — means PMH rejected at open
predictions.actual: SPY tagged 737.13/737.29 at open and rejected hard to 734.37. No sustained close above PMH. Extension to 743.35 never attempted. Session high only ~737.29 per J's live observation.

predictions.claim: SMA50 (735.58) and PML (734.80) hold as intraday floor — any dip to 735.00-735.60 bounces on 5m chart
predictions.invalidation: 5m close below 734.60 — structure breaks bearish, premarket low taken out
predictions.actual: Session low 731.23 — well below PML 734.80 and SMA50 735.58. Both violated decisively. Close 732.13. Bear continuation dominated all afternoon.

predictions.claim: 743.35 (broken Carry support) acts as overhead resistance on first test — any tag sees at least $1.50 rejection
predictions.invalidation: 5m close above 744.00 on first approach to 743.35 zone
predictions.actual: SPY never approached 743.35. Session closed at 732.13, session high ~737.29. The carry resistance zone was out of range entirely.

predictions.claim: No BEARISH_REJECTION setup triggers before 11:00 ET — ribbon BULL (74c spread) at open, no early flip expected
predictions.invalidation: Ribbon flips BEAR (Fast EMA < Slow EMA on 5m close) AND rejection candle at named level before 10:30 ET
predictions.actual: No BEARISH_REJECTION setup triggered before 11:00 ET. Engine was blind at open; ribbon remained BULL at 09:35 (structural). Only HOLD_DEV signals emitted throughout morning. Ribbon eventually flipped BEAR by afternoon (130c spread by 14:39 ET).

surprises: PCE-eve compression trapped both directions — opened bull gap, PMH rejection, partial recovery, then afternoon sell-off to 731.23; the 74c BULL ribbon at open gave false structural confidence for the day
Engine structurally blind at 09:35 ET (TV reload at bell, 280s kill) missed the PMH rejection — J's cleanest read of the day. Third documented session with this pattern.
Bold scored 11/11 BULLISH_RECLAIM with level_reclaim at PMH at 11:00 ET — highest quality signal of day — vetoed by block_bull_morning_agg blunt time gate. Fixed live mid-session.
lesson: Two orthogonal failure modes today: BLIND at 09:35 (TV hardware at bell) and OVER-GATED at 11:00 (blunt time-block on perfect signal). Open blindness (OPEN-BLINDNESS-TV-HANG) is P0 — until shipped, first-bar PMH rejections are structurally unplayable for the engine.
tomorrow_hint: PCE 08:30 ET — no-trade 08:25-08:50 ET. New floor 731.23 / 734.80 flipped resistance / 737.11 rejection zone. Ribbon BEAR 130c. Trade the PCE reaction, not the premarket drift.
